reference_images.label: umbra_scale_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Tower chamber palette, art deco framing, light beam composition, and shadow contrast anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteBundle for the prism prop and pair it with three beam emit slots generated by gameplay code.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/obstacle_prism_glass_splitter_48x48.png through AssetServer during level assembly and attach it to PrismSplitter entities.
runtime_notes: Prism does not rotate in gameplay and always aligns to a 32 px grid anchor.
Outgoing beam directions are handled by code while the art stays visually neutral across all split states.
Transparency and highlights must remain readable on dark and bright backgrounds.

context.usage: Secondary beam routing prop that splits one incoming beam into three fixed outputs for multi target puzzles.

shape.silhouette: Square mount holding a triangular prism core with beveled gold corners and a bright central refraction line.

specs.texture: Clean glass planes with small amber edge catches and a dark recessed mount.
specs.shading: Bright center highlight with darker violet edges to show thickness.

acceptance_criteria: Triangular glass core leaves a minimum 6 px margin from the outer frame on all sides.
Central refraction line stays vertically centered and reads clearly against both dark and light beam backgrounds.
